title: Troubleshooting the inability to switch to the default locale on the Nuxti18n root path.
description: While working with Nuxt-i18n v8.0.0-beta.10, it was discovered that the `switchLocalePath()` function could not be used to move to the root path. T...

children.value: While working with Nuxt-i18n v8.0.0-beta.10, it was discovered that the

function could not be used to move to the root path.
There was no problem with routing between other routes, and only routing through locale switching from the root path was problematic.

The problem was expected in the browser language detection settings because the problem occurs only in the root path.
This is because there is a part in which the root path is explicitly related.
As expected, when I removed the most suspicious
option, the locale transition worked normally.
I know the cause, but I couldn't think of a solution, so I used it as a

for a while.
Using this strategy, the url path only needs
switching, so the settings described in the previous step did not effect it, so we decided to apply it temporarily until we found an alternative.
Previous step solution was worked, but it wasn't the way I wanted it to be, and it seemed more natural to use

, so I wanted to apply it somehow.
Therefore, I had to solve the problem by searching, but it is really difficult to set the search keyword when there is an uncommon problem like this problem.

Eventually I couldn't decide on the search keyword and started looking thoughtlessly for similar issues on Nuxt-i18n Github, fortunately I was able to find the Github issue I wanted without taking long.
I was able to solve the problem with

code.
However, I prefer simpler code if it works the same function, so I decided to handle the click event directly without expanding the
I've extracted some of the codes I'm currently using.

props.code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { LocaleObject } from "vue-i18n-routing"

const { locale, locales } = useI18n()
const switchLocalePath = useSwitchLocalePath()

const availableLocales = computed(() => {
  return (locales.value as LocaleObject[]).filter(i => i.code !== locale.value)
})

const router = useRouter()
const cookie = useCookie("i18n_redirected")
const onClickLocaleSwitch = (code: string) => {
  cookie.value = code
  router.push(switchLocalePath(code))
}
</script>

<template>
  <nuxt-link
    v-for="locale in availableLocales"
    :key="locale.code"
    :to="switchLocalePath(locale.code)"
    @click.prevent="onClickLocaleSwitch(locale.code)"
  >
    <icon name="mdi:translate" size="20" class="mr-1" />
    {{ locale.name }}
  </nuxt-link>
</template>

modules: ['@nuxtjs/i18n'],
i18n: {
  baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
  langDir: "./helpers/locales",
  locales: [
    { code: "ko", iso: "ko-KR", name: "한국어", file: "ko.json" },
    { code: "en", iso: "en-US", name: "English", file: "en.json" },
  ],
  strategy: "prefix_except_default",
  defaultLocale: "en",
  detectBrowserLanguage: {
  useCookie: true,
    cookieKey: "i18n_redirected",
    redirectOn: "root",
    alwaysRedirect: true,
    fallbackLocale: "en",
  },
},
